mapper.insert: INSERT INTO collab.collaboration_command_events ( trip_id, actor_user_id, websocket_session_id, source, command_type, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, version_before, version_after, payload, inverse_payload, redo_payload, created_at ) VALUES ( #{event.tripId}, #{event.actorUserId}, #{event.websocketSessionId}, #{event.source}, #{event.commandType}, #{event.aggregateType}, #{event.aggregateId}, #{event.versionBefore}, #{event.versionAfter}, #{event.payload}::jsonb, #{event.inversePayload}::jsonb, #{event.redoPayload}::jsonb, #{event.createdAt} )
